name: Brighton College (Singapore)
tagline: A premium British education from one of the UK's top independent schools
description: Brighton College (Singapore) opened in 2020 as the first international campus of Brighton College UK, one of England's leading co-educational independent schools. Located near Lorong Chuan, the school offers a British curriculum from Nursery (age 3) through to A-Levels at Sixth Form, with IGCSEs at the secondary level. With approximately 500 students, Brighton College Singapore provides a nurturing yet ambitious environment that mirrors the academic standards and pastoral care of its UK parent school. The campus features purpose-built facilities designed for the Singapore context.

admission.process: Submit an online application with supporting documents. Children attend an age-appropriate assessment and interview. Brighton College seeks students who will thrive in a British curriculum setting.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions. Main entry in September. Apply 6-12 months in advance.

faqs.question: Is Brighton College Singapore connected to Brighton College UK?
faqs.answer: Yes, Brighton College (Singapore) is a sister school of Brighton College UK. The Singapore campus shares the same educational philosophy and high academic standards.

faqs.question: Does Brighton College offer boarding?
faqs.answer: No, Brighton College (Singapore) is a day school only. Boarding is available at the UK parent school for families considering that option.

seo.description: Brighton College Singapore: premium British curriculum school near Lorong Chuan, opened 2020. IGCSE and A-Levels from Nursery to Sixth Form. View 2026 fees and admissions.
